entry.title: New: RES26-026 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL, HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS, MEALS, AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $2,900, TO THE CITY FROM THE AMERICAN ASSOCIATION OF MOTOR VEHICLE ADMINISTRATORS (AAMVA) FOR A REPRESENTATIVE FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF CUSTOMER SERVICES TO ATTEND THE 2026 AAMVA LEADERSHIP ACADEMY CONFERENCE FROM APRIL 13 TO APRIL 17, 2026, IN ARLINGTON, VIRGINIA.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
